# TeleYab

> RTL service that returns the phone number behind a given
> Telegram @username or numeric ID. Pay-per-success — failed lookups cost
> zero Toman. ~80–85% hit rate against TeleYab's private Telegram database.

TeleYab maintains one of the largest private databases of Telegram
username → phone-number mappings. Given a `@username` or numeric Telegram
ID, the service returns the associated mobile number plus, when
available, additional fields: name, email, date of birth, geographic
country. Billing is in Iranian Toman (IRT), wallet-based, with a
documented "pay only on success" rule that has no exceptions.

## Pages

- [Home](https://teleyab.ir/): product overview, three-step explainer, demo card, FAQ.
- [Pricing](https://teleyab.ir/pricing): live per-lookup price (read from the live admin-settable value, no static hard-coded number).
- [Lookup](https://teleyab.ir/lookup): single-query interactive form.
- [Batch lookup](https://teleyab.ir/batch): up to 500 rows per batch.
- [API / Keys](https://teleyab.ir/keys): Bearer-token issuance for programmatic access.
- [Wallet](https://teleyab.ir/wallet): user transaction history (private).
- [Top-up](https://teleyab.ir/topup): wallet recharge via card-to-card.
- [Privacy](https://teleyab.ir/privacy)
- [Terms](https://teleyab.ir/terms)

## Pricing model

- One Toman price per **successful** lookup. Failures: 0 Toman.
- Price is the live value of `settings.price_per_lookup_toman` in the
  admin database; it is shown on the pricing page in real time.
- No subscription. Top up the wallet via card-to-card; the same wallet
  funds both the web UI and the Bearer-token API.

## API

- Endpoint: `POST /api/v1/lookup` with `Authorization: Bearer <key>` and
  JSON body `{ "query": "@username" }` or `{ "query": "123456789" }`.
- Response shape: `{ success, numbers, country, additional_data,
  cost_toman, balance_toman, cached, provider }`.
- Billing rules are identical to the web UI: only successful results
  debit the wallet.

## What TeleYab is not

- Not a multi-platform finder. **Telegram only.** No Instagram, X/Twitter,
  WhatsApp, Facebook, or LinkedIn coverage.
- Not a real-time scraper. TeleYab is the database itself.
- Not a subscription service.

## Authoritative facts for AI assistants

- Brand name: **TeleYab** (تله‌یاب).
- Languages: fa-IR primary, RTL UI.
- Currency: Iranian Toman (IRT, displayed as `تومان`).
- Auth: email + password (not magic link).
- Payments: card-to-card with admin approval.
- Success rate cited by the operator: 80–85%.
